response.overview: Excellent recording from digital BBC TV of Radiohead at the Glastonbury Festival in Somerset on June 28th 2003. There There, 2+2=5, Lucky, The National Anthem, Talk Show Host, Where I End & You Begin, Climbing Up The Walls, The Gloaming, No Surprises, Fake Plastic Trees, Sit Down Stand Up, Go To Sleep, Sail To The Moon, Paranoid Android, Idioteque, Everything In Its Right Place, Just, Karma Police, Street Spirit (Fade Out). 90 minutes.
response.title: Radiohead - Glastonbury 2003
